items.title: This postseason, the Spurs have blown six double-digit leads, the most in a single playoff run in the play-by-play era (since 1997). The previous record was five, set by San Antonio in 2003.

items.title: 🚨NEW: Olivia Miles must have felt like Wednesday was a NASCAR race: every time she went left, she zoomed to the finish line with a layup. The LA Sparks, missing Kelsey Plum and Cameron Brink, had no answer, losing to the Lynx. Sometimes basketball is simple.🔗 justinrusso.substack
